transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sunrise Recovery Center.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Hi, I need help. My brother — his name is Marcus — he's in really bad shape. He told me last night he wants to get help and I'm calling on his behalf. My name is Kelli.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: What's wrong with him?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: He's been on meth for two years. Last night he had a breakdown. He's never opened up like this before and I'm afraid if I don't act now he'll change his mind.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay. What's his date of birth?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: March 14th, 1993.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: And his insurance?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: It's Summit Select. Member ID BP10774917, group GRP-272579.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Has he used anything today?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: I don't know. Probably.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Does he have any mental health issues?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: He's been depressed for a long time. That's part of why he started using, I think.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Any medical conditions?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Not that I know of.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay. We'll need him to call us or come in.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: He's not going to do that on his own. Can you help me figure out how to get him there? He's willing right now — tonight.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: We can't admit someone without them presenting themselves. He needs to call.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: I understand that. But is there anything I can do? Any guidance on how to talk to him?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Just bring him in or have him call.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Is there a crisis line or an interventionist you work with?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: We don't have that here. He can call when he's ready.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Okay. Thank you.

gold_labels.coaching_notes: Poor family caller handling: agent collected patient's DOB and insurance without any consent framing. Sibling's distress ('I'm afraid', urgent window) entirely ignored. No warmth or acknowledgement throughout. Did not offer crisis resources or intervention referral when directly asked — that's a missed escalation opportunity. Should have offered to speak with patient directly.
